stories.headline: Taylor Frankie Paul's Exes Share Same Legal Team in Renewed Custody War - TMZ
stories.summary: It looks like double trouble for Taylor Frankie Paul ... because her ex, Dakota Mortensen, has hired the same legal team as her ex-husband, Tate Paul, in a renewed court battle over parental custody.

stories.headline: Ashley Tisdale ‘Toxic Moms’ Comedy In Works At Netflix With Sabrina Jalees & Ali Wong - Deadline
stories.summary: Ashley Tisdale 'Toxic Moms' comedy series has landed at Netflix for development with Sabrina Jalees writing and Ali Wong executive producing.

stories.headline: ‘Chicago P.D.’ Shocker: LaRoyce Hawkins Exiting in Season 14 - tvinsider.com
stories.summary: Find out when Kevin Atwater will be written out.

stories.headline: Permit obtained by AP shows schedule for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding - AP News
stories.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding is set to begin at New York's Madison Square Garden at 5 p.m. Friday. The event could last until 4 a.m. the next morning. A city permit obtained by The Associa…

stories.headline: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Donated $26 Million to Charities Ahead of Wedding - Variety
stories.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have donated $26 million to charities, a rep announced, prior to their wedding.

stories.headline: Madonna Confessions II Reviewed: A magnificent return to the dance floor - Mojo Magazine
stories.summary: After a long and anxious seven-year wait, Madonna finally plugs back into her clubland roots with a record of shamanic force.

stories.headline: Taylor Frankie Paul's Ex-Husband Submits New Texts As Evidence In TRO Fight - TMZ
stories.summary: Taylor Frankie Paul's custody fight with ex-husband Tate Paul isn't over yet ... because after a judge denied his request for a temporary restraining order, he's asking the court to take another look.

stories.headline: Alex Rodriguez kisses mystery woman at Michael Rubin white party months after public breakup - New York Post
stories.summary: Yankees legend Alex Rodriguez enjoyed some PDA with a brunette woman while in the Hamptons at Michael Rubin’s Fourth of July White Party.
